form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at Hobart latest but prior to that recorded a speedy 29.87 over 515m finishing second at this track. Can measure up on top effort two back.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (30.05) when third at this track in a Restricted WIN. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed four times. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: Finished third last time (19.70) over 340m at Hobart. Has a low draw. Top-three aspirations.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third last time (19.70) over 340m at Hobart. Has a low draw. Top-three aspirations.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped, was severely checked and fell.

form.formComment: Placed at all starts this track and trip. Latest effort finished 5th over 461m at Hobart beaten 3 lengths (26.43) behind Unconvicted in a Grade 5 on April 3. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 1.75 lengths at Hobart (19.39) beating Call Sergeant in a Restricted WIN on April 2 five days ago. This is much harder assignment and she needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at his last couple of starts, most recently at Hobart over 461m. Will be tested in this company.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 15 length seventh (30.72) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at Hobart. Has ability but this tough and looks a place chance at best.
